task_completion.description: Open the raw leaf specimen image in Fiji/ImageJ.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji/ImageJ interface visible with 'leaf_specimen.jpg' open in an image window.

task_completion.description: Calibrate the image scale using the 2 cm reference line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Set Scale' dialog box is visible with 'Known distance' set to 2.0 and 'Unit of length' set to 'cm', or the image window title shows dimensions in 'cm' instead of 'pixels'.

task_completion.description: Configure measurements to include Area, Perimeter, Circularity, and Feret's Diameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Set Measurements' dialog is visible with 'Area', 'Perimeter', 'Shape descriptors' (which includes Circularity), and 'Feret's diameter' checked.

task_completion.description: Segment the leaf from the background to create a binary mask.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A thresholding tool is used or a binary (black and white) mask of the leaf shape is visible in an image window.

task_completion.description: Burn a visual scale bar onto the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visual scale bar (e.g., generated via Analyze > Tools > Scale Bar) is visible on the leaf image.

task_completion.description: Save the measurements CSV, annotated image, and mask to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Save dialogs or a file manager window showing 'measurements.csv', 'annotated_leaf.png', and 'leaf_mask.png' being saved to or existing in the '~/Fiji_Data/results/botany/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Fiji/ImageJ GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Fiji menus, dialogs, and toolbars rather than just a terminal running a script.

integrity.description: Measurements are genuinely calculated by the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Results' window in Fiji displays the calculated metrics (Area, Perim, Circ, Feret) rather than being manually typed into a text editor or spreadsheet.

integrity.description: The binary mask corresponds to the actual leaf in the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The shape of the white/black area in the mask perfectly matches the contour of the leaf specimen shown in the original image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input image is located at '/home/ga/Fiji_Data/raw/botany/leaf_specimen.jpg'. The reference line in the image is exactly 2.0 cm, which must be used for calibration. The required outputs are 'measurements.csv', 'annotated_leaf.png', and 'leaf_mask.png', all to be saved in '/home/ga/Fiji_Data/results/botany/'. Measurements must be in physical units (cm/cm²).
